_meta.purpose: Stage 2 — per-component rollup. Reads canonical entity score docs from m_26_14-scores (element:asset, is_canonical:true, written in the last 2h), groups by asset.component, and aggregates n (entity count), reporting (sum score_inventory), covered (sum score_coverage), min_horizon (min effective_horizon_days). The m_26_14-score-rollup-pipeline dest pipeline enriches config thresholds, runs level_from_pct for inventory/coverage and retention_level for retention, and emits a combined element:'rollup' doc per component with score_inventory/score_coverage/score_retention (0-4 each). _id = 'rollup::<component>'. The 2h @timestamp range filter prevents stale entity docs from inflating the denominator (H3: entity-left-store staleness). Run AFTER m_26_14-score-entity completes its cycle.
